name: Evasion: DEX Save AoE Damage Negation
description: Tests Evasion feature (Rogue 7/Monk 7). A Wizard casts Burning Hands at two targets: a Rogue Scout (className Rogue, level 7 — has Evasion) and a regular Goblin (no Evasion). Both have very high DEX (+10 modifier, +13 total save) vs DC 14, guaranteeing the DEX save always succeeds. With Evasion, save success = 0 damage. Without Evasion, save success = half damage. Verifies Evasion is correctly detected via className+level and applied through the save-spell-delivery pipeline.

monsters.comment: Rogue Scout — has Evasion (className Rogue, level 7). Very high DEX ensures save always succeeds. With Evasion: success = 0 damage.
monsters.name: Rogue Scout

monsters.comment: Goblin — no Evasion. Same very high DEX ensures save succeeds. Without Evasion: success = half damage (at least 1).
monsters.name: Goblin

input.text: I spread my hands wide and cast Burning Hands

actions.comment: Cast Burning Hands aimed at Rogue Scout. Both Rogue Scout (15,10) and Goblin (20,10) are in the 15ft cone along the x-axis. Both have DEX save +13 vs DC 14 — always succeeds. Rogue Scout has Evasion (0 damage on success). Goblin takes half.

input.text: cast Burning Hands at Rogue Scout

actions.comment: Rogue Scout with Evasion: DEX save always succeeds, Evasion makes damage 0. HP stays at 40.
Goblin without Evasion: DEX save succeeds but no Evasion, takes half damage. 3d6 = 3-18, half = 1-9. HP: 40 - (1-9) = 31-39.
